description: Perform a forensic analysis of the messy real-world water meter readings to detect a leak. Identify the leak's start date, calculate the total volume of water wasted, and determine the associated cost. Record the leak start date, total waste volume, and total cost.

natural_language.prompt: You have received an unexpectedly high water bill. Analyze the daily meter readings in the CSV file to find when the leak started, how much water was wasted, and the cost.
